title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at JSW Steel Global Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at JSW Steel Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with JSW Steel Global Group! We are hiring a Production Engineer for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About JSW Steel Global Group:
JSW Steel Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel Global Group!
